channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The primary entry point and integration layer for the GitHub Actions environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: Logic Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Client-side processing and filtering of analysis results. Architectural overview of the Logic domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Infrastructure and data modeling for interacting with the Supermodel analysis service. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Testing Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Verification suite for ensuring logic accuracy and integration stability. Architectural overview of the Testing domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
